name: SeedVR2 Complete
description: Offline SeedVR2 image and video upscaling runtime for Storyboard Copilot. Bundles a portable Python bridge, the upstream SeedVR2 inference code, default local weights, and packaged ffmpeg tools for video encoding and audio remux.

hardwareRequirements.summary: This package targets Windows desktop with a local NVIDIA GPU workflow. SeedVR2 is intended for offline high-quality image and video upscaling, and the current preset targets roughly 12 GB or more of VRAM for stable execution.
recommendations: Recommended: NVIDIA GPU with CUDA 12 support and at least 12 GB of VRAM.
The assembled package is large because it includes a portable Python runtime, local SeedVR2 source, default model weights, runtime caches, and ffmpeg binaries.
Video runs are fixed to a conservative streaming preset so long clips do not have to load every frame into memory at once.
notes: This first version only exposes one fixed default model combination: SeedVR2 3B FP8 plus the FP16 VAE.
The template is assembled into build/extensions/seedvr2-complete and is not intended to be loaded directly before packaging.
Upstream code is Apache 2.0; keep model provenance and usage notes in the packaged README.

startupSteps.label: Validate package
startupSteps.description: Check the SeedVR2 runner entry, local model files, and ffmpeg tools.

startupSteps.label: Verify runtime
startupSteps.description: Check Python, CUDA, and SeedVR2 inference dependencies.

startupSteps.label: Verify models
startupSteps.description: Check the bundled default SeedVR2 DiT and VAE weights.

startupSteps.label: Warm up runtime
startupSteps.description: Probe CUDA and import the fixed SeedVR2 inference stack before exposing the nodes.

startupSteps.label: Register nodes
startupSteps.description: Expose the SeedVR2 image and video nodes to the canvas.
